# [Clang] Assertion `!isExprSubstitutionFailure() && "ExprRequirement has no expression because there has been a " "substitution failure."` failed.

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176402
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, concepts, confirmed, crash, lambda, generated by fuzzer, regression:17
**Closed Date:** 2026-01-20T16:35:51Z

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 17.0.1.
The code is accepted by gcc and clang 16.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/fWMfh5v1Y
Same assertion as #115513 and #130620.
The stack dump is similar to #130620, but #130620 is no longer crash in trunk.

## Program
```cpp
f() {
  auto recursiveLambda = [](auto self, int depth) -> void {
    struct MyClass;
    auto testConcept = []<typename T> {
      return requires(T) { &MyClass::operator0 }
    };
  };
  recursiveLambda(recursiveLambda, 5);
}
```

## Program
```cpp
f() {
  auto recursiveLambda = [](auto self, int depth) -&gt; void {
    struct MyClass;
    auto testConcept = []&lt;typename T&gt; {
      return requires(T) { &amp;MyClass::operator0 }
    };
  };
  recursiveLambda(recursiveLambda, 5);
}
```
